title: $10,000 AI Website in 28mins
summary: Jack Roberts demonstrates building a website comparable to a $10,000 professional project in just 28 minutes using AI tools. The video showcases rapid AI-assisted web development and the efficiency gains from automation.
writeup: Jack Roberts builds a website in 28 minutes using AI tools, framing the result as comparable to a $10,000 professional project. The walkthrough centers on AI-assisted web development and the efficiency gains that come from automating the build. The takeaway: AI coding and workflow automation can compress what was a costly, time-intensive deliverable into a rapid prototyping session.
